---
title: "Weekly Respiratory Infection Surveillance · Wk 18, 2026"
author: "Acme National Health Surveillance Unit"
date: "2026-05-08"
format: html
---

## Executive Summary

Week 18 (2026-04-27 to 2026-05-03): cases per 100,000 = **142**, exceeding epidemic threshold (50). Reproduction number R(t) = **1.42** (95% CI 1.28–1.58). Geographic concentration: SK Metropolitan (38% of national).

## Trend (Past 18 weeks)

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv("data/weekly_cases.csv")
df.tail(8)
```

Cases sustained above threshold for 4 consecutive weeks. Doubling time ~9 days.

## Age Stratification

| Age Group | Cases per 100k | YoY |
|-----------|---------------|-----|
| 0–4       | 198           | +24% |
| 5–17      | 156           | +18% |
| 18–64     | 132           | +14% |
| 65+       | 122           | +9%  |

Children aged 0–4 disproportionately affected.

## Geographic Distribution

| Region        | Cases/100k | Threshold |
|---------------|-----------|-----------|
| SK Metro      | 198       | exceeded ⚠ |
| GG            | 168       | exceeded ⚠ |
| BS            | 134       | exceeded ⚠ |
| DG            | 102       | exceeded ⚠ |
| Other         | 88        | approaching |

## Etiology

Influenza A (H1N1) accounts for **63%** of laboratory-confirmed cases this week, RSV 22%, SARS-CoV-2 9%, other 6%.

## R(t) Estimation

R(t) = 1.42 (1.28–1.58) using EpiEstim sliding 7-day window. Trend: stable from Wk 16. Containment threshold (R<1) not yet achieved.

## Recommendations

1. **Vaccination push**: 65+ uptake currently 47%, target 70% by Wk 20.
2. **School advisory**: enhanced hygiene + symptomatic isolation in SK Metro / GG.
3. **Hospital surge**: ICU bed reserve 12% nationally; trigger surge plan if Wk 19 cases > 160.

## Methods

Passive surveillance (501 sentinel sites) + laboratory confirmation. ICD-10 J09–J18. Population denominators from KOSIS 2025.

## Next Update

Wk 19 (2026-05-15).
